text:
Silva Zoldyck (シルバ＝ゾルディック, Shiruba Zorudikku) is the current head of the Zoldyck Family, the father of the Zoldyck siblings, and an elite professional assassin. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 2, Chapter 13 

Appearance

Silva is a tall, muscular man in extremely good physical condition. He has long, silver-blond hair (platinum-blond hair in the 1999 anime adaptation) with deep blue cat-like eyes. He is always dressed in a sleeveless or short-sleeved shinobi shōzoku outfit and wears a pair of wristbands.

Personality

Silva is a stoic, calm, and pensive person. Silva has little shown interaction with his son Killua, but he holds him in high esteem and has made Killua the heir to the family. Silva later realized that Killua didn't share his passion for assassination, and allowed his son to go with Gon on their journey to find his father, but only because he saw it as a crucial step in Killua's development as the heir to the Zoldyck Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 42 He is shown to dislike Zeno's somewhat windbag attitude and reminds himself to ignore half of everything Zeno says whenever Zeno has a new experience to talk about.

According to Killua, Silva worked carefully as an assassin. Like his eldest son, Illumi, Silva believes it is logical that an assassin should never take risks on a mission, no matter how small, and you should only enter combat when victory is 100% certain; otherwise, he must wait. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 125 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 219 

Despite being a cold assassin to the core, he doesn't seem to be entirely devoid of compassion, as he rescinded the lookout orders on Killua and Alluka given to his butlers after watching (through a camera) their emotional fraternal moment, possibly touched by the event. Additionally, he decided to have his first fatherly conversation with Killua, asking him about everything that happened to him during the Hunter Exam, demonstrating an interest in him, and affectionately tussling his hair. He also has an honorable side, as he made Killua swear a blood oath never to betray his friends. 

Silva has a good relationship with most of the other Zoldycks, as he's stated to love his wife Kikyo, and to have a give-and-take relationship with his father Zeno, and his sons Illumi Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 326 and Milluki. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 72 He apparently does not agree with Illumi about killing Alluka, only wanting to control her power. 

Background

 by an unnamed mother and is Zeno's only son. He is also the only great-grandson of Maha. Not much is known about his childhood, but he was trained from a very young age in the art of assassination, which gave him such abilities as strong resistance to almost all types of poisons and high tolerance to electricity. Later on in his life, he married Kikyo, a fellow assassin, and fathered five children with her.

Three years prior to the start of the series, he was hired to assassinate one of the Phantom Troupe members. The Spider in question was Shizuku's predecessor. Although the mission was a success, he felt disappointed that the payment he received wasn't worth it - the highest compliment he ever gave to a target. Upon returning, he warned all of his children (except Alluka) to stay away from the Troupe. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 80 He also fought their leader, Chrollo Lucilfer. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 99 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Silva makes his first appearance during a father-and-son conversation with Killua. He asks Killua about the new friends that he met during the 287th Hunter Exam and what he thinks of the Hunter Exam. Killua says that he never really wanted to be a Hunter, but that he really enjoyed the exam and the company of his new-found friends. Silva shares his upbringing by his parents to be an assassin, which led to him having raised Killua the same way. He admits failing to realize how different they are, and tells Killua that he wants him to be happy by doing whatever he pleases because Killua is first and foremost a person in his own right, not just Silva's son. 

Silva allows Killua to be reunited with his friends but has him first take a blood oath to not betray any of them. After Killua leaves, Silva is seen brushing off chastisement from his wife, Kikyo, who protests his decision to allow Killua to leave them again for his friends. She brings up that Illumi had tried hard to bring Killua back home, and that this is the decisive and critical moment to find out if he deserves to be their successor. Silva tells her to stop talking since she understood what was at stake, and chuckles sinisterly, declaring that Killua would return home one day because he is his son. 

Yorknew City arc

Several months later, Silva appears in Yorknew City together with Zeno as two of the assassins hired by the Mafia Community, paid to assassinate members of the Phantom Troupe. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 10, Chapter 89 Kurapika, present at the meeting where the hired assassins gather for a briefing, notes that they are at a different level than the rest. While some assassins propose working together, Silva declines and says that he and Zeno would work in their own way without accepting orders from others. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 95 Shortly after, Mafia leaders present panic when a large number of their gangsters are quickly killed by the Phantom Troupe. Silva punches the wall loudly, leaving a large hole, in order to stop their panic and have them quietly listen as Zeno warns them of the danger posed by the enemies. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 98 

The two Zoldycks immediately start to search for the enemies inside the building using Zeno's En and find Chrollo in the basement. Before they engage Chrollo, Silva warns his father that Chrollo could steal others' abilities. They quickly gain the upper hand, but Chrollo manages to nick Silva on his left arm with a Ben's Knife. Silva identifies the knife as a poisonous one from its shape, then plucks a strand of hair from his head to use as a torniquet and reassures Zeno that there is no problem. Chrollo is amusingly surprised by his seeming resistance to the poison, which is strong enough to paralyze a whale with only 0.1 milligrams of it. Zeno assesses Chrollo and deduces that he is a Specialist, and that even if Chrollo could steal another's Nen, he would have four or five conditions to meet, which would be almost impossible if fighting against people with their combat prowess. From this train of thought, Zeno decides to attack Chrollo alone, and tells Silva to back up up and kill Chrollo as soon as he restrained him, even if Silva had to kill him too. 

As the fight goes on, Silva observes that Chrollo had gotten stronger since the last time they fought, and considers the possibility of being unable to kill him without risking their lives because of the unknown powers that Chrollo had stolen since their last fight. Zeno chases Chrollo around with a Nen dragon to try and pin him against the wall, and does so successfully after Silva distracts Chrollo with a sudden flare of aura. As Zeno moves to secure Chrollo in position, he calls for Silva to kill Chrollo, who immediately hits them with two huge balls of aura, causing a large explosion. Right before the orbs hit, Silva slightly redirects his attack, because of a beep signaling the successful assassination of their clients by other Zoldycks. Silva picks up the call from Illumi, who asks if his client, Chrollo, is still alive. After Silva affirms that Chrollo was still alive, Illumi asks Silva to pass a message to Chrollo with an update on his commission and directions for payment, and then Silva and Zeno withdraw from the job. They explain to a curious Chrollo that the Ten Dons had been their client, and so he was no longer their target. As Silva leaves, he gives Chrollo a glare. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 100 

Chimera Ant arc

Silva later appears amid the Extermination Team's assault on the Royal Palace of the Republic of East Gorteau to pick up his father. Seeing that Zeno is being followed by a Squadron Leader Chimera Ant, Cheetu, he dives from a dragon in the sky and crushes Cheetu's head with a single punch, creating a large crater on the ground. As they are leaving East Gorteau on the dragon, Zeno tells him that he met Killua in the palace, that he has grown up, and that he may have removed Illumi's needle, but Silva stays silent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 26, Chapter 278 

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Silva appears again when his son Killua comes home asking to see Alluka in order to help restore Gon to his normal self. Silva refuses Killua's initial request because he believes Alluka to be uncontrollable, even telling Killua to refer to 'him' as an 'it'. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 321 He relents after Killua appeals to the promise not to betray his friends that he had made, and leads Killua into a dark tunnel with Alluka's room at its end, locked in a vault behind four 10-digit-keypad password-protected doors. Before Killua goes in, Silva asks him to recite the rules about Alluka's power, citing as the root of his concern how many people she has killed. Killua flares up and points out that their family has killed more, but Silva remains calm and insists on it, telling Killua that their deal would be off if he did not remain calm and that he valued the promise he made with him and cares for him as a father. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 322 

In a flashback, Silva and Kikyo speak with Killua after Mitsuba, a butler reported an incident with Alluka, where Alluka's eyes turned black after she played with her, and Killua returned Alluka back to normal. After Silva and Kikyo had heard Killua explain Alluka's powers, they decided to have the butlers refuse all of Alluka's demands. Soon after, Mitsuba dies after being gruesomely flattened, together with another butler somewhere else on the estate, confusing Silva and Kikyo further. Butlers are told to follow Alluka's demands, but after one of them, out of weariness for her situation, makes a wish, Silva and Kikyo have Alluka kept with them. They note that Alluka never makes demands when around them, and Illumi asks to pick the next butler, in order to further experiment with Alluka's abilities. As Killua runs through his family's memories with Alluka, he recites the rules of how her ability works, and is granted access to her. 

From a camera room, Silva, Kikyo, and Milluki observe Killua playing with Alluka, and granting her three simple demands. Silva glares at Milluki after Milluki remarks that his previous request had turned out to be an easy demand, and Milluki quickly backtracks and apologizes. Silva relaxes and asks Milluki if Alluka was ready to grant a wish now, and Milluki confirms that she is. Silva asks Milluki to verify the rules they knew of, and after Milluki recites the rules, they return to watching Killua and Alluka. Silva notes that Killua was taking longer to make a wish than expected, and wonders if he was worrying about having someone else pay the price before even moving to save Gon. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 324 

Their conversation is cut off when they notice Killua walking towards the door with Alluka, asking Silva to open the door. Through the intercom, Silva refuses, and tells Killua to make his wish there. Killua pleads with him, saying that they were father and son. Hearing Silva continue to remain silent, Killua calls for Nanika to kill Kikyo if they failed to leave the mountain together within thirty minutes, surprising them. Silva opens the door, and Killua leaves with Alluka. 

As Killua leaves, he speaks on the phone, but is cut off by Gotoh who reminds him that he was on Outing Precaution Level 4. Killua thinks that Silva must have been annoyed at him. Killua makes plans to set out with Gotoh and Canary, but before they leave, fellow butlers Tsubone and Amane join them, having been ordered to do so by Silva. Tsubone declares that she would not be as soft on Killua as Silva had been. 

Silva and the family continue watching the situation through a camera hidden on Tsubone. Illumi goes to confront Killua after Gon is healed, but is forcibly teleported to the camera room where the rest of the family are, surprising them. Tsubone follows Killua's request to grant them some privacy, and as she and Amane step away, Silva lets them know that Killua had been released from his precaution level. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 32, Chapter 336 

Equipment

Zoldyck Personal Transmitter: The assassins of the Zoldyck Family can contact each other with a special transmitter to report the fulfillment of a murder contract. 

Abilities & Powers

Being a world-renowned assassin and head of the infamous Zoldyck Family, Silva is an extremely skilled Nen user and unarmed combatant, as he was trained in the art of assassination from a very young age; furthermore, he has vast wealth and capable underlings at his disposal. His family name alone is enough to scare those familiar with it. Like many Zoldyck Family members, Silva is extremely resistant to poison and has great strength, speed, and superhuman control over his body. He also defeated and killed an unknown member of the Phantom Troupe three years prior to the start of the main story, and dueled against Chrollo to an unknown result (both of them survived, though, and in the anime, Silva was shown coming back with no visible injury).

Assassination Skills: Silva is one of the best killers in the world. According to Killua, he can tear out the heart of a person without dropping a single blood drop. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 21 As Killua’s father and one of his trainers in assassination, Silva can likely perform assassination arts such as Rhythm Echo and adjusting the anatomy of his own body to create sharp claws, though this has never been shown happening in the series.

Immense Strength: Silva has tremendous physical strength, as demonstrated when he fell from the sky, crushing Cheetu's head with a single blow and creating a large crater while taking no damage himself. During his fight with Chrollo his punch, although blocked, retained enough power to cause the Phantom Troupe leader to lose his balance. Since he is a Zoldyck assassin, Silva can also open the Testing Gates, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 39 although the number of doors he can open is unknown.

Immense Speed and Reflexes: Killua mentioned that he could rip out somebody's heart so fast that it would not even bleed. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 21 He matched Zeno and Chrollo in speed during their confrontation. 

Enhanced Durability: Silva's skin cannot be pierced by ordinary blades. His hair is strong enough to act as a tourniquet. 

Immense Poison Resistance: Poison is ineffective against Silva, as seen when Chrollo attempted to poison him by cutting him with his Ben's Knife, Silva popped the poison out of the cut and resumed fighting with apparently no consequence, although he deemed necessary the application of a tourniquet. Chrollo himself was surprised because 0.1 milligrams of the toxin he used was enough to paralyze a whale. 

Master Hand-to-Hand Combatant: Silva is capable of gouging out a man's heart with his bare hands and at an impressive speed, Killua claiming he can do so without spilling a drop of blood from the wound. He fights using his arms and legs, harnessing the full strength of his body. When in tandem with Zeno, he puts all his power into his blows at the expense of leaving himself open, knowing that his father will cover him. 

Nen

Silva is an Emitter who can emit his aura in two large orbs of frightening power, The fact that he killed Cheetu at close range while creating a large explosion and taking no damage himself, strongly indicates that Silva has also mastered Enhancement. The only techniques he has been seen using so far are Ten, Hatsu, and In, since Cheetu was not capable of sensing him coming.

Manga Appearances

Battles

Quotes

(To Killua) "I want to hear all about it. Your exam experiences, who you met, how you felt, anything and everything. Just... talk to me." 
(To Killua) "We're father and son, but there hasn't been a lot of meaning in that. I was raised by my parents to be an assassin, and I believed that was how I should raise you. But you're no mere extension of me. The day you... left, I finally realized that while you're my son, you're also your own person. With your own path to follow. Perhaps, in time, it will lead you back here. All right? So I'll ask again... would you like to see your friends?" 
(To Kikyo, referring to Killua) "Don't worry, he'll be back. He is, after all, my son." 
(To Zeno) "I should take your stories with a grain of salt." 
(To Killua, referring to Alluka) "That entity is not human. Don't think of him as family. He's something from another place... Something that came out of the darkness." 
(To Killua) "If you can't keep your calm, it ends here. I value the promise I made with you, because I care about you as a father." 

Trivia

In the official databook, his name is also spelled as "Sillva Zaoldyeck". 
Before the official confirmation of Silva's Nen type from the Togashi exhibition, he was said to be a . 
Silva's name might be derived from his hair color, which is light and could be silver.
His name, coincidentally, is also the Latin word for "forest" and a common surname in the Portuguese and Spanish languages.
In one of the licensed light novels written by Kishima Nobuaki, more information about Silva's treatment with Killua was revealed, however the canonicity of the book is ambiguous: During an unknown year, Killua adopted a dog named "Wolf", however, a year later, Silva made him kill the dog as he claimed Wolf had rabies. Hunter × Hunter 3 - Jump J Book (Light Novel) 
Silva keeps gigantic dogs inside his room, only a bit smaller than Mike. 
According to Killua, he likes Benny Delon and his works. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 10, Chapter 85 
He is the tallest member of the Zoldyck Family.

Intertextuality and References

In a 1999 doujinshi titled "Weekly Togashi Empire" (週刊冨樫帝国, Shūkan Togashi Teikoku), Togashi revealed that Silva was based on the character of Yuujirou Hanma from the Baki manga series, written and illustrated by Keisuke Itagaki. Weekly Togashi Empire (1999) 

Miscellaneous

In the first character popularity poll, Silva placed 15th with 85 votes, a tie with Ging Freecss.
In the second character popularity poll, Silva placed 13th with 144 votes.
